code:
import string

fn build_msg(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut msg = ""
  mut count = 0
  if string.is_empty(name)
    msg = "#{msg}empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count > 0
      msg = "#{msg},negative-age"
    else
      msg = "#{msg}negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count > 0
      msg = "#{msg},too-old"
    else
      msg = "#{msg}too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=#{msg}"
  end
end

print(build_msg("", -5))
print(build_msg("Alice", 30))
print(build_msg("Bob", 200))
